title: Customisable Unique ID
excerpt: Hi i want to start creating a numbering system for our jobs on the a prticular board but the build in Unique ID column has no customisable features. i would like to be able to set a prefix and mayble have a more managebl…

posts.author: mathump3 (Mathew Humphrey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi i want to start creating a numbering system for our jobs on the a prticular board but the build in Unique ID column has no customisable features. i would like to be able to set a prefix and mayble have a more manageble numbering system rather than 10 digit number and an option where to start the numbering. eg 22/XXXX

posts.author: szev (Sharon Zeveney)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree this is needed and upvoted!!! Please get this feature similar to jira or clickup
